title: Rename device - Rename, emojis not allowed
scenario: Emojis entered in the device name field should disable the "Done" button and prevent the device name from being changed.
steps: Tap on the device name field to edit it.
Enter an emoji (e.g., 😊) into the device name field.
Observe the state of the 'Done' button.
Attempt to save or confirm the change.
Return to the Home screen and check the displayed device name.
expected: The "Done" button should be disabled when an emoji is entered. The device name should not be changed. On the Home screen, the device name should remain unchanged (no emoji shown).
